subtitle: A complete loyalty platform — coupons, stamps, points, streaks and referrals in one app.
section1Description: Create various coupon types: percentage discount, multi-buy, day-of-week offers — and manage them from one panel.
section2Description: Digital stamp cards with milestones and automatic rewards — no more paper cards.
section3Description: Streak programs motivate customers to visit regularly with staged rewards — the more they return, the more they earn.
fifthSectionSubtitleLeft: Bonapka for customers and BonApka Merchant for your business — together they form a complete loyalty platform.
fifthSectionSubtitleRight: All loyalty program configuration and statistics always at your fingertips in the mobile app.
